headline: Is It Too Late To Consider PulteGroup (PHM) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you own PulteGroup or are just watching from the sidelines, the real question is whether the current share price reflects what the business is actually worth. The stock recently closed at US$121.75, with returns of 1.6% over 7 days, 2.1% over 30 days, 2.3% year to date, 28.6% over 1 year, 105.6% over 3 years, and 137.8% over 5 years, so recent price action gives plenty for valuation focused investors to think about. Alongside these returns, investors have been digesting ongoing news and...

headline: Markets Are Calm About Iran, CEOs Less So. Earnings Will Be a Pivotal Moment.
summary: U.S. military adopts a siege strategy, new opponent emerges in Paramount-Warner Bros. merger, spring home sales off to slow start, and more news to start your day.
